title: brosimum utile subsp. allenii
intro: Brosimum utile subsp. allenii, also known as Allen's broom or Brosimum allenii, is a plant species in the family Moraceae, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Brosimum utile subsp. allenii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and digestive issues. The plant is typically harvested for its leaves, which are then used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and powdered for use in capsules or tablets.
